risks: Upstream Warp is a native desktop terminal, not an HTTP web app.
This package exposes a Linux desktop session through noVNC.
Public store publication must preserve AGPL/MIT notices and avoid implying official Warp endorsement.

1.conclusion: 已识别上游为 GitHub 仓库并完成部署材料扫描

2.conclusion: full_migrate 识别为原生桌面项目；改走 noVNC 桌面封装路线

4.conclusion: 已创建 app 骨架、Dockerfile、许可证文件和图标

5.conclusion: manifest 已按 noVNC 单服务拓扑生成

6.conclusion: README、构建配置和上游部署清单已补齐

problems.description: full_migrate.py cannot automatically migrate Warp because it is a native desktop/CLI repository without a production HTTP service topology.
problems.resolution: Use a custom target_repo_dockerfile that installs the official Linux warp-terminal package and exposes it through Xvfb/x11vnc/noVNC.
